creator: jochen@daten-chaos.de
text:
A new install from Chromium from the ports.

When Chrome start, and i will go to bsdforen, google whatever, the window from chrom are white.

In the German supportforum BSDforen a lot of people with the same Problem http://www.bsdforen.de/threads/chrome-liefert-kein-bild.29836/

I use chromium-30.0.1599.101
